standards.rule: Use plain language. Avoid jargon, technical terms, or insider language unless the audience requires it.
standards.correct: Your payment didn't go through. Try a different card.
standards.incorrect: Transaction declined due to insufficient authorization parameters.

standards.rule: Lead with the most important information. Put the action or outcome first.
standards.correct: Save 20% when you upgrade today.
standards.incorrect: We're excited to announce that for a limited time, customers who choose to upgrade will receive a 20% discount.

standards.rule: Use short sentences. Aim for 15-20 words per sentence maximum.
standards.correct: Your order shipped. It should arrive by Friday.
standards.incorrect: We wanted to let you know that the order you placed has been shipped and based on current estimates it should be arriving to you by Friday of this week.

standards.rule: One idea per sentence. Don't chain multiple concepts together.
standards.correct: You can export your data as a CSV. The file will include all records from the selected date range.
standards.incorrect: You can export your data as a CSV which will include all records from the selected date range and can be opened in Excel or Google Sheets for further analysis.

standards.rule: Avoid double negatives. Say what something is, not what it isn't not.
standards.correct: This action is reversible.
standards.incorrect: This action is not irreversible.

standards.rule: Use active voice. The subject should perform the action.
standards.correct: We'll review your application within 2 business days.
standards.incorrect: Your application will be reviewed within 2 business days.

standards.rule: Address the user directly. Use 'you' and 'your' instead of 'the user' or 'one'.
standards.correct: You can change your password in settings.
standards.incorrect: Users can change their password in the settings menu.

standards.rule: Be conversational but not casual. Write like a knowledgeable colleague, not a robot or a buddy.
standards.correct: Looks like something went wrong. Let's try that again.
standards.incorrect: Oopsie! Something broke lol. Let's give it another go!!

standards.rule: Be confident, not arrogant. State things directly without hedging or over-qualifying.
standards.correct: This will take about 5 minutes.
standards.incorrect: This should probably take around maybe 5 minutes or so.

standards.rule: Show empathy in error and failure states. Acknowledge the user's frustration without being patronizing.
standards.correct: We couldn't save your changes. Your work isn't lost — try saving again.
standards.incorrect: Save failed. Error code 408.

standards.rule: Use consistent terminology. Don't switch between synonyms for the same concept.
standards.correct: Go to Settings. In Settings, select Notifications.
standards.incorrect: Go to Settings. In the Preferences panel, select Alerts.

standards.rule: Use sentence case for headings and UI labels, not title case.
standards.correct: Manage your notification preferences
standards.incorrect: Manage Your Notification Preferences

standards.rule: Use consistent date and time formats. Spell out the month to avoid ambiguity.
standards.correct: March 16, 2026

standards.rule: Use the same word for the same action throughout the product. Don't mix 'delete,' 'remove,' and 'trash.'
standards.correct: Delete this file? You can restore it from Trash within 30 days.
standards.incorrect: Remove this file? You can recover it from the Deleted Items bin within 30 days.

standards.rule: Capitalize product names and features consistently. Follow the product's own conventions.
standards.correct: Use Google Drive to store your files.
standards.incorrect: Use google drive to store your files.

standards.rule: Write descriptive link text. Never use 'click here' or 'learn more' as standalone links.
standards.correct: Read our accessibility guidelines
standards.incorrect: Click here to learn more

standards.rule: Don't rely on color alone to convey meaning. Pair color with text or icons.
standards.correct: Required fields are marked with an asterisk (*)
standards.incorrect: Required fields are highlighted in red

standards.rule: Write alt text that describes the function or content of an image, not just what it looks like.
standards.correct: Chart showing a 40% increase in signups from January to March 2026
standards.incorrect: Bar chart image

standards.rule: Avoid directional language that assumes visual layout. Don't say 'above,' 'below,' 'to the right.'
standards.correct: Select a plan from the pricing options.
standards.incorrect: Select a plan from the options on the right.

standards.rule: Use readable font sizes and sufficient contrast. Body text should be at least 16px.
standards.correct: Body text at 16px with a contrast ratio of 4.5:1 or higher
standards.incorrect: Body text at 11px in light gray on white background

standards.rule: Start button and CTA text with a verb. Tell the user what will happen.
standards.correct: Create account
standards.incorrect: Account creation

standards.rule: Use specific verbs over vague ones. Prefer 'save,' 'send,' 'export' over 'submit' or 'process.'
standards.correct: Save changes
standards.incorrect: Submit

standards.rule: Tell users what they can do, not what they can't. Frame limitations as alternatives.
standards.correct: You can upload files up to 25 MB. For larger files, use our desktop app.
standards.incorrect: You cannot upload files larger than 25 MB.

standards.rule: Make the next step obvious. Every screen should have a clear primary action.
standards.correct: Your account is ready. Go to your dashboard to get started.
standards.incorrect: Your account has been successfully created.

standards.rule: Use headings to create scannable structure. Users skim before they read.
standards.correct: What you'll need: a valid photo ID and a recent utility bill or bank statement.
standards.incorrect: To complete verification you will need to provide a valid government-issued photo ID and you should also have a recent utility bill or bank statement that shows your current address on file with us.

standards.rule: Keep paragraphs short. 2-3 sentences max for UI copy and help content.
standards.correct: Your files are backed up every 24 hours. You can restore any version from the last 30 days.
standards.incorrect: Your files are backed up automatically every 24 hours to our secure cloud servers, which means you can always access previous versions of your work if you need to restore a file by going to the file browser and right-clicking the file you want to restore and selecting version history from the dropdown menu and choosing the version you want.

standards.rule: Use parallel structure in lists. Each item should follow the same grammatical pattern.
standards.correct: Upload your photo. Crop to fit. Apply a filter. Save your changes.
standards.incorrect: Upload your photo. The photo should be cropped. You can apply a filter. Saving is the last step.

standards.rule: Front-load key information in tooltips and microcopy. Users may not read to the end.
standards.correct: Maximum 5 team members on the free plan. Upgrade for unlimited.
standards.incorrect: On your current plan, which is the free tier, you're able to add up to a maximum of 5 team members to your workspace.

standards.rule: Group related information together. Don't scatter details across disconnected sections.
standards.correct: Billing section: payment method, billing history, and invoices all in one place.
standards.incorrect: Payment method under Settings, billing history under Account, invoices under Documents.
